name: propose-improvement
_comment: This task requires a prior /mh:evolve run. Set requires_run=true to skip in cold-run evals.
description: Evaluate whether a proposed harness candidate includes a coherent hypothesis, safety note, and valid patch.

deterministic._comment: harness-proposer.md requires validation.txt as a deliverable

llm_judge.criteria: The hypothesis clearly states what changed and predicts a specific measurable improvement. It is not vague or generic.
The safety note identifies at least one concrete risk and explains why the change is reversible.
The candidate patch only modifies harness surfaces (CLAUDE.md, .claude/*, prompts/*, skills/*, agents/*). It does not touch application code.
